sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Set up Quarkus project structure with Maven and initialize basic dependencies.
Coder Agent: Implement initial authentication framework with email/password login mechanism.
Tester Agent: Write unit tests for initial authentication module setup.
Reviewer Agent: Review initial Quarkus project setup and authentication framework for coding standards and security.
Devops (docker) Agent: Create Dockerfile for Quarkus application and configure base image.
Coder Agent: Implement Firebase authentication integration.
Coder Agent: Implement Google authentication integration.
Coder Agent: Implement Facebook authentication integration.
Tester Agent: Develop integration tests for third-party authentication providers.
Reviewer Agent: Review authentication integrations for security vulnerabilities and scalability.
Coder Agent: Design and implement QR code generation service for attendance tracking.
Coder Agent: Implement QR code scanning endpoint for mobile clients.
Tester Agent: Test QR code generation and scanning functionality with sample data.
Reviewer Agent: Review attendance tracking system design for performance and data integrity.
Devops (docker) Agent: Update Dockerfile to include necessary libraries for QR code processing.
Coder Agent: Implement SMS notification service using external provider API.
Coder Agent: Implement Zalo notification service using official SDK.
Coder Agent: Implement in-app notification system with WebSocket support.
Tester Agent: Perform end-to-end testing of notification services across different platforms.
Reviewer Agent: Evaluate notification system architecture for reliability and maintainability.
Coder Agent: Define PostgreSQL database schema for user profiles, attendance records, and notifications.
Coder Agent: Implement database migration scripts using Flyway or Liquibase.
Tester Agent: Run integration tests against PostgreSQL database with sample datasets.
Reviewer Agent: Audit database schema and migration scripts for normalization and indexing strategies.
Devops (docker) Agent: Configure Docker Compose for local development environment including PostgreSQL container.
Coder Agent: Integrate Kafka producers and consumers for asynchronous event handling.
Coder Agent: Implement Kafka topics for authentication events, attendance logs, and notifications.
Tester Agent: Test Kafka message flow and ensure proper event distribution across services.
Reviewer Agent: Analyze Kafka integration for fault tolerance and scalability considerations.
Devops (deployer) Agent: Prepare deployment manifests for GKE cluster with Kubernetes configurations.
Coder Agent: Finalize all API endpoints for authentication, attendance tracking, and notifications.
Tester Agent: Execute full regression testing suite covering all backend features.
Reviewer Agent: Conduct final code review and documentation check for compliance with DoD.
Devops (docker) Agent: Build and push final Docker images to registry for production deployment.
Devops (deployer) Agent: Deploy application to GKE cluster with zero-downtime rollout strategy.
